basic_details.job_title: Ambedkar Nagar Hospital Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Ambedkar Nagar Hospital, Govt. of NCT of Delhi
basic_details.short_information: Ambedkar Nagar Hospital is recruiting Senior Residents on ad-hoc basis for 89 days (extendable).

age_limit.age_details: Maximum 45 years as on date of interview

qualification.details: Essential Qualifications: | MBBS with PG Degree/Diploma or equivalent qualification in the concerned specialty recognized by NMC/MCI. For non-PG candidates: At least two years’ experience in the concerned specialty (if PG candidates not available). Valid registration with Delhi Medical Council (DMC). Should not have completed three years of Senior Residency. | Age Limit: Maximum 45 years as on the date of interview.

salary_details.pay_scale: Level-11 as per 7th CPC (Basic Pay Rs. 67,700/- + allowances)

selection_process: Walk-in Interview Registration: 09:30 AM to 11:00 AM (sharp) on the day of interview Venue: O/o Head of Office
New Delhi-110062 Candidates must bring all original documents and self-attested copies.
how_to_apply: No online application is required. Interested and eligible candidates should appear for walk-in interview with all original certificates, testimonials, and one passport-size photograph.
All educational certificates and mark sheets
important_instructions: Appointment is purely on ad-hoc basis for 89 days (extendable). No claim for regular appointment. Private practice is strictly prohibited. Candidates already working elsewhere must submit relieving order. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview.

content_sections.heading: Ambedkar Nagar Hospital Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Govt. of NCT of Delhi, Ambedkar Nagar Hospital has issued a notice for walk-in interview for the recruitment of Senior Residents on ad-hoc basis against vacant posts. Download Ambedkar Nagar Hospital Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Ambedkar Nagar Hospital Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: Ambedkar Nagar Hospital is recruiting Senior Residents on ad-hoc basis for 89 days (extendable).

rows.ambedkar_nagar_hospital_govt_of_nct_of_d: Level-11 as per 7th CPC (Basic Pay Rs. 67,700/- + allowances)
Maximum 45 years as on date of interview

content_sections.heading: Ambedkar Nagar Hospital Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: *Vacant / likely to fall vacant. Number of posts may change without prior notice.

content_sections.heading: Ambedkar Nagar Hospital Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Essential Qualifications: MBBS with PG Degree/Diploma or equivalent qualification in the concerned specialty recognized by NMC/MCI. For non-PG candidates: At least two years’ experience in the concerned specialty (if PG candidates not available). Valid registration with Delhi Medical Council (DMC). Should not have completed three years of Senior Residency. Age Limit: Maximum 45 years as on the date of interview.

content_sections.heading: Ambedkar Nagar Hospital Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Walk-in Interview Registration: 09:30 AM to 11:00 AM (sharp) on the day of interview Venue: O/o Head of Office, 4th Floor, Ambedkar Nagar Hospital, Block-B, Sector-5, New Delhi-110062 Candidates must bring all original documents and self-attested copies.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for Ambedkar Nagar Hospital Senior Resident Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: No online application is required. Interested and eligible candidates should appear for walk-in interview with all original certificates, testimonials, and one passport-size photograph. Documents Required: All educational certificates and mark sheets PG Degree/Diploma certificates DMC Registration Certificate Experience certificates Caste/Category certificate (if applicable) Valid ID proof

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for Ambedkar Nagar Hospital Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Appointment is purely on ad-hoc basis for 89 days (extendable). No claim for regular appointment. Private practice is strictly prohibited. Candidates already working elsewhere must submit relieving order. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview.

faq.question: Q1. What are the walk-in interview dates for Ambedkar Nagar Hospital Senior Resident 2026?
faq.answer: Walk-in interviews are scheduled from 13 July 2026 to 17 July 2026 (Monday to Friday).

faq.question: Q2. How many Senior Resident vacancies are available at Ambedkar Nagar Hospital?
faq.answer: Total 02 vacancies — 1 in Medicine (OBC) and 1 in Obstetrics & Gynaecology (UR).

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Senior Resident at Ambedkar Nagar Hospital?
faq.answer: Basic Pay in Level-11 (Rs. 67,700/-) as per 7th CPC + other allowances and HRA.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: Maximum age is 45 years as on the date of interview.

faq.question: Q5. What is the essential qualification for Senior Resident in Medicine / Obs & Gynae?
faq.answer: MBBS + PG Degree/Diploma in concerned specialty + valid DMC registration.

faq.question: Q6. Is prior experience required for non-PG candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, non-PG candidates need at least two years’ experience in the concerned specialty.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the venue for Ambedkar Nagar Hospital walk-in interview?
faq.answer: O/o Head of Office, 4th Floor, Ambedkar Nagar Hospital, Block-B, Sector-5, New Delhi-110062.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent job?
faq.answer: No. Appointment is on ad-hoc basis for 89 days (extendable) and will not confer any right for regular post.

faq.question: Q9. Do I need Delhi Medical Council registration?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates must have valid registration with Delhi Medical Council (DMC).

faq.question: Q10. Will there be any relaxation for reserved category candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, relaxation for PwD (Divyangjan) as per Govt. of India rules. SC/ST/OBC candidates must submit valid certificates.
